data.title: 2-Day Penang  Weekend

stops.description: Classic dim sum pushcart experience in Georgetown
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your breakfast — a highly rated spot
stops.address: 45, Lebuh Cintra, George Town, 10100 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Southeast Asia's largest Buddhist temple complex
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your tourist attraction — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Kek Lok Si Temple, 86s, Jln Balik Pulau, 11500 Ayer Itam, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Specialty coffee in a heritage shophouse with courtyard
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your cafe stop — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: 10d, Jalan Clove Hall, George Town, 10050 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Wok-hei packed char kway teow by two sisters
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your lunch — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: 96, Lorong Macalister, George Town, 11400 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Contemporary art space in a repurposed bus depot
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your hidden gem — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: 31A, Jalan Gurdwara, 10300 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Ernest Zacharevic murals scattered across Georgetown
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your photo spot — a highly rated spot
stops.address: 316, Beach St, Georgetown, 10300 George Town, Penang, Malaysia

stops.description: Fine Peranakan dining in Seven Terraces hotel
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your dinner — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: 14A, Lorong Stewart, George Town, 10200 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Beachside pasar malam with souvenirs and street food
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your night activity — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Jalan Pantai Batu, Taman Pantai Batu, 11200 Tanjong Bungah, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Charcoal-toasted bread with kaya and half-boiled eggs since 1959

stops.address: Lebuh Campbell, George Town, 10450 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Historic waterfront settlements on stilts with local life

stops.description: Instagram-worthy coffee bar with exotic beans

stops.address: 7, Lbh Armenian, George Town, 10200 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Famous asam laksa near Kek Lok Si temple

stops.address: Jalan Pasar, Paya Terubong, 11500 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Sandy shores with water sports and sunset views
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your nature — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Jalan Batu Ferringhi Batu Ferringhi, 11100 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Cool mountain air with 360° views of the island and mainland
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your tourist attraction — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Unnamed Road, 11500 Bukit Bendera, Penang, Malaysia

stops.description: Wanton mee, curry mee, lok-lok in heritage quarter
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your dinner — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Lbh Chulia, George Town, 10450 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Speakeasy cocktail bar above a kopitiam
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your night activity — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: 63, Jalan Magazine, 10300 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

tips: Try local drinks — teh tarik, cendol, nutmeg juice, calamansi lime
Go early for popular eateries to beat the queues and the heat
Street food is where you find Malaysia's best flavors at the best prices
Download offline Google Maps for areas with poor reception
